untranslatable_reason: Signal requires manually-drawn horizontal support and resistance lines, which are not quantifiable from the allowed indicator set. The pivot levels (pivot, s1, r1) are used as a proxy for horizontal levels, but true implementation requires user-defined price levels that cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_3 references visually-identified horizontal support/resistance lines with importance weighted by 'longer time intervals and more points'. Since manual trendlines are not available in the allowed indicators, this uses Pivot Point levels (pivot, s1, r1) as a mechanical proxy. For production use, this signal should be implemented with user-defined support/resistance price levels. Maximum risk is defined on chart but not translated to stop_loss_pct due to lack of specific threshold data.
